Statistical Inference & Hypothesis Testing
Full test suite. Tests auto-select parametric vs non-parametric based on normality. Every result explained in plain English.
Auto Hypothesis Tests — Smart Test Selection
The toolkit reads your data, auto-selects the correct test for each pair (parametric if normal, non-parametric if not), and ranks results by significance.
